examples: She is unusual to the point of eccentricity.
Changes in the eccentricity of Earth's orbit occur in a cycle of about 96,000 years.
Changes in eccentricity, tilt and wobble do not affect the total amount of solar radiation Earth receives in a year.
He enjoyed its eccentricity and air of English amateurism, and he served bravely in Libya and Sicily.
In keeping with his consistent brand of eccentricity, many said it added to his profile and his reputation.
